description: Spanish subsidiary of Docplanner Group operating TopDoctors and doctoralia brands. Leading healthcare marketplace in Spain connecting patients with doctors through booking platform and practice management software.
business_model: B2B - SaaS to doctors/clinics; B2C marketplace for patient bookings
competitive_advantage: Market leader in Spain, strong brand, comprehensive platform

varden_fit.rationale: Distribution channel in Spain - could integrate occupational health services
